titleStmt.title: SII 6.649: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 649. (A.R. No. 203 of 1899). ON A SLABAt the top areIN THE SIVA TEMPLE AT MURIKIPUDI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . sakalabudhajanā
śraya satyaśaucatyāgādi
[dha¨rmma]guṇanilaya manmakulavā¨rddhiva
[¨rddhana]sudhākara saujanyaratnākara subha
ṭamā¨rttaṁḍa nayama¨rttigaṁḍa velacche ¨rla
puraśāsana vi kamalāsana baṁdhu
janasamuddharaṇa śivapādaśēkha
ra parāṁganāputra patihitābha
raṇulaina śrīmatu mallanāyakulu
dama yēlikūraina moṟkipūṁḍi Ū
ri tū¨rppuna jīyalaceṟvu śakava¨rṣa
ṁbulu 1082 nēṁṭi yuttarāyanasaṁkrāṁ
ttinimittamuna mallikhā¨rjunadēvaruku
rāmīśvaradēvaruku nityanivēdyamulaku Ā
ceṟuvu Ācaṁdrā¨rkamugā niccitimi yī
yūri dēvarulaku ptānāvatulaiyina na
rajīyala koḍkulu vēmajīya bhīmajīya
dēvajīyalaku vritticēni khaṁḍuvulu 5 vīni
nācaṁdrā¨rkkamugā niccitimi . svasti śrīma
tu mallenāyakula bōyuṁḍu naradānvayu
ṁḍaina muduvanabōyini koḍkulu mācana
vēmanalu Ī dēvarulakē nityanivēdya
mulaku nnūrimuṁdaṭi cēṟvuvenuka ni cci
na maṟuturulu 2 pittruhitā¨rtthamu A
caṁdrā¨rkkamugā niccitimi .

yī dha¨rmmuvunaku nevvarēni vilōma
mu sēsirēni vārāṇāsi vraccinavā
ru gaṁggakaṟutaṁ gavila vadhiṁccinavāru
peddakoḍuku kapālamunaṁ guḍicina
vāru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti va
suṁdharaḥ . ṣaṣṭi¨rvvaruṣa sahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyā
ṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 6.649 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
